# Skills Pack for This Repository

This directory contains a curated set of production-ready skills imported from validated public repositories and adapted for this codebase workflow.

## Selected Skills

- dev-api-design
- dev-git-workflow
- dev-structured-logs
- qa-testing-strategy
- software-architecture-design
- software-backend
- software-code-review
- software-frontend
- software-payments
- software-security-appsec

## Source

- Primary source: AI-Agents-public (vasilyu1983)
- Imported from: frameworks/shared-skills/skills

## Usage

- Invoke these skills when tasks match the domain.
- Prefer existing project rules in .github/instructions when there is overlap.
- Keep this set curated; add only skills that are repeatedly useful in this repository.
